# ADR-<NNN>: <short decision title>

> Architecture Decision Record (Nygard format). One file per significant decision, so the
> *why* is auditable later. Authored in `.md`, rendered to `.html`.

| | |
|---|---|
| **Status** | proposed / accepted / superseded by ADR-<n> |
| **Date** | <YYYY-MM-DD> |
| **Deciders** | <agents / people> |

## Context
The forces at play: the problem, constraints, regulatory drivers, and what makes this
decision necessary now.

## Decision
What we are doing, stated plainly.

## Consequences
The trade-offs — positive and negative — that follow from the decision, including any new
risks or obligations.

## Alternatives considered
Options weighed and why they were not chosen.
